content: We can reframe LLM self-reflection mechanisms to incorporate the explicit 'reflective writing' pedagogy from high school English education that builds the reflexion skill, turning iterative LLM self-correction into a structured 'writing workshop for model reasoning' where the LLM documents and critiques its own problem-solving steps the way human students practice reflective writing. This structured pedagogy-derived framework would improve LLM self-reflection consistency compared to current unstructured prompt-only approaches.
